description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Commit that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow consists of three jobs: darglint, coverage, and build_posix. Each job runs on a matrix of operating systems and Python versions, setting up Python, installing dependencies, and running tests with nox. The darglint and coverage jobs run sequentially on a single operating system and Python version, while the build_posix job runs in parallel across multiple operating systems and Python versions.
